title: juncellus lateralis
intro: Juncellus lateralis, also known as the dwarf club-rush, is a species of flowering plant in the sedge family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Juncellus lateralis include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestive issues, as well as its potential to protect against certain diseases. Juncellus lateralis can be prepared for herbal use through various methods, including infusion, decoction, and tincture.
